title: $stripattributes
text: $stripattributes Return the result of removing character attributes, frames, and rulers from a string. $stripattributes ( String ) Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description String String String, field, variable, or a function that evaluates to a string. Return Values String with character attributes, frames, and ruler removed. Use Allowed in all component types. Description The $stripattributes function returns the result of removing character attributes (bold, italic, and underline), frames, and rulers from String . Note: Characters that are not known in the target character set are not stripped from the string, unlike the behavior in Uniface 8 in which they were stripped. Example: Stripping Character Attributes from a Field The following ProcScript example shows how you can strip character attributes from a Unifield, so the text can be used in field EDITBOX: MYFIELD = "aaabbb" EDITBOX = $stripattributes(MYFIELD) ; EDITBOX contains "aaabbb" Copy Related Links $bold Apply the bold character attribute to a string. $italic Apply the italic character attribute to a string in a Unifield. $underline Return the result of applying the underline character attribute to a string. stripattributes Remove character attributes, frames, and rulers from Source and put the result in Target.
